nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: Partly cloudy. Low around 53, with temperatures rising to around 57 overnight. South southwest wind around 7 mph.

nws.name: Memorial Day
nws.shortForecast: Mostly Sunny then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms after 3pm. Mostly sunny. High near 86, with temperatures falling to around 82 in the afternoon. South wind 2 to 9 mph, with gusts as high as 22 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%.

nws.name: Monday Night
nws.shortForecast: Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms then Mostly Cloudy
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms before 9pm. Mostly cloudy. Low around 55, with temperatures rising to around 59 overnight. South wind around 12 mph, with gusts as high as 20 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.
